items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of the 'Third-party extension code review process' but did not provide any concrete evidence or results from the simulation. The expected result was to confirm the scenario behavior or produce a failure report, yet there is no documentation of the actual outcome or any traces captured during the simulation. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
